free_text: Study of the Average Level Spacing from
powder, purity better than 99.9%, sample sandwiched
between 2 cellotapes, perspex ring for fixed geometry
given error consists of ERR-1 -ERR-4 and
statistical which error varies from one case to another
Uncertainty in estimation of total number of
geometry effect which will depend upon reproducibility
Uncertainty due to gamma- and beta-rays
Absence of thermal neutrons determined, influence of
scattered neutrons of lower than 24. keV energy
negligible due to geometry, i.e. large room, remote
location of neutron source from the floor (=1.3 m)
and no shielding material around the source.
TMK.Coding change from iso-quant to react.
